name: filesystem
description: Tools for interacting with the filesystem

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a given relative file path. Use this when you want to see what's inside a file.

path.description: The relative path of a file in the working directory.

message.description: A message describing the result of the operation.

content.description: The content of the file if successful.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files and directories at a given path. If no path is provided, lists files in the current directory.

path.description: Optional relative path to list files from. Defaults to current directory if not provided.

message.description: A message describing the result of the operation.

files.description: The list of files and directories if successful.

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Make edits to a text file. Replaces 'old_str' with 'new_str' in the given file.

old_str.description: Text to search for - must match exactly and must only have one match exactly

message.description: A message describing the result of the operation.
